notes: A writing-assistance layer — typing assistant, grammar fixes and AI rewrite in any text box — plus a one-line installer/updater.
items: Typing assistant — autocomplete and spelling fixes in any text box (>typing)
Grammar fixes as you type — free, no key, many languages (>grammar)
AI rewrite with your own key — Groq, Gemini, Claude, Ollama and more (Alt+R)
AI reply drafts (Alt+A) and one-key page summaries (Alt+W)
One-line installer & updater for Windows, Linux and macOS
